title: Honmoon PII evaluation record
description: One document per line (JSONL). The single normalized format every dataset source is converted into and the only format the scorer consumes. See docs/pii-benchmark-goals.md §6.

surface.description: The wire surface the text imitates. 'prose' = free text; the rest mirror what Honmoon actually inspects.

lang.description: BCP-47-ish language tag. Korean-first benchmark; 'en' kept for regression only.

text.description: The raw document text exactly as inspected. span offsets index into this string.

spans.description: Gold PII spans. Empty array ⇒ a negative document (precision probe).

split.description: Evaluation split. 'test' is frozen and never inspected.

start.description: Inclusive UTF-16 code-unit start offset into `text` (JS String semantics).

end.description: Exclusive end offset; must be > start.

label.description: A Honmoon canonical label key defined in labels.yaml.

text.description: The surface form of the PII, equal to text.slice(start, end). Carried for the substring/position-insensitive matcher.

tier.description: Detection tier (1 deterministic, 2 format/dictionary, 3 quasi-identifier). Mirrors labels.yaml; carried for per-tier scoring.
